title: QuickBooks Online Customer
description: A Customer represents a consumer of the service or product that the business offers. The Customer entity supports a hierarchy where customers can have sub-customers (jobs) organized under a parent customer. DisplayName must be unique across all Customer, Employee, and Vendor objects within a QuickBooks Online company.

Id.description: Unique identifier for the customer, assigned by QuickBooks Online.

SyncToken.description: Version number of the entity used for optimistic concurrency control. Required for update operations.

Title.description: Title of the person (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Ms., Dr.).

Suffix.description: Suffix of the person (e.g., Jr., Sr., III).

DisplayName.description: The name displayed to identify the customer in the QuickBooks UI and on transaction forms. Must be unique across all Customer, Employee, and Vendor objects.

CompanyName.description: The company name associated with the customer.

PrintOnCheckName.description: Name to print on checks issued to this customer.

Active.description: Whether the customer is currently active. Inactive customers do not appear in transaction drop-downs but their data is retained.

Taxable.description: Whether transactions for this customer are taxable.

PrimaryEmailAddr.description: Primary email address for the customer.

BillAddr.description: Default billing address for the customer.

ShipAddr.description: Default shipping address for the customer.

Notes.description: Free-form text notes about the customer.

Job.description: Whether this customer represents a job (sub-customer) rather than a top-level customer.

ParentRef.description: Reference to the parent customer if this is a sub-customer (job).

Level.description: Depth level in the customer hierarchy. 0 indicates a top-level customer.

FullyQualifiedName.description: Fully qualified name of the customer including all parent names separated by colons (e.g., 'ParentCustomer:SubCustomer').

CurrencyRef.description: Reference to the currency used by this customer. Only applicable for companies with multicurrency enabled.

PreferredDeliveryMethod.description: Preferred method for delivering communications to this customer.

Balance.description: Open balance amount for the customer (sum of all open invoices minus payments).

BalanceWithJobs.description: Open balance amount including balances of all sub-customers (jobs).

SalesTermRef.description: Default sales terms for transactions with this customer.

PaymentMethodRef.description: Default payment method for this customer.

TaxExemptionReasonId.description: The tax exemption reason identifier if the customer is tax-exempt.

IsProject.description: Whether this customer is a project (QuickBooks Online Plus and Advanced only).

PrimaryTaxIdentifier.description: Primary tax identifier for the customer (e.g., ABN in Australia, GSTIN in India).

GSTRegistrationType.description: GST registration type (applicable for India and Australia editions).

BusinessNumber.description: Business number of the customer (used in certain international editions).

sparse.description: Indicates whether this is a sparse (partial) representation of the entity.

ReferenceType.description: A reference to another entity in QuickBooks Online.

value.description: The unique identifier of the referenced entity.

name.description: An identifying name for the referenced entity.

Line1.description: First line of the street address.

Line2.description: Second line of the street address.

Line3.description: Third line of the street address.

Line4.description: Fourth line of the street address.

Line5.description: Fifth line of the street address.

CountrySubDivisionCode.description: Region within a country (e.g., state, province).

MetaData.description: Metadata about entity creation and modification timestamps.

CreateTime.description: Timestamp when the entity was created.

LastUpdatedTime.description: Timestamp when the entity was last updated.
